title: MCC Island Unlocked
description: A mod pack that is made to give new features and optimise the experience for MCC Island.
body:
A major update is coming soon!
==============================================================

This modpack strives to make it easy to access the best mods to use when playing MCC Island, adding many new features and optimizations to make the experience the best!

Some of the new features that this pack offers in, music from the event, visible player tags, a stat tracker in all events, and a greeter!

==============================================================

✔️  MCC Player Stats - View your stats in each game in the top right, such as holes survived in HITW.

✔️  MCC Name Tag Mod - See your rank and name by viewing yourself not in the first person.

✔️  MCCI Greeter - Automatically say glhf and gg at the end of every game!

✔️  MCC Island Companion - Adds in-game music, a preview of cosmetics, and more!

✔️  Sodium & More - Adding sodium, Noxsieum, and more allows for personalized optimization when playing!

✔️  And more...

==============================================================
